Brand Identity · Digital Campaign · Print

Marketing Campaigns
at Dahua Europe

European event branding, integrated marketing design, and B2B product literature — transforming complex AIoT technology into engaging, human-centric visual stories for a diverse international audience.

Client

Dahua Europe B.V.

Role

Graphic Designer

Year

2024 — 2025

Scope

Brand Identity Digital Campaign Print

01 — European Event Branding

Visual storytelling for
high-profile trade shows

I spearheaded the visual identity for multiple high-profile European trade shows and corporate events. My focus was on transforming complex technical security concepts into engaging, human-centric visual stories that resonated with a diverse international audience.

Brand Identity — Developed unique event logos and colour palettes that aligned with Dahua's global brand while giving each event a distinct personality.

Collateral Design — Designed comprehensive suites of physical assets including large-scale booth banners, wayfinding signage, and high-impact print invitations.

Digital Promotion — Created a full library of promotional graphics for LinkedIn, email marketing campaigns, and event registration pages to drive attendance.

Visual Consistency — Ensured a seamless visual story across all touchpoints — from the first digital invitation to the final on-site experience.

02 — Dahua Partner Day & Product Launches

Strategic event branding for
flagship European events

For Dahua's flagship European events — including the prestigious Dahua Partner Day and several New Business Line introductions, Dahua Plus — I served as Lead Visual Designer, responsible for crafting a cohesive visual story that bridged the gap between complex AIoT technology and premium brand aesthetics.

My work encompassed the entire event ecosystem, from the initial digital invitation and logo creation to the physical environment — large-scale banners and promotional event graphics. This ensured a unified and professional brand experience for hundreds of international tech partners and industry leaders.

03 — Event Outreach: Social Media Banner Suite

Digital visual story for
Dahua's 2024–2025 event calendar

This collection features the digital visual story created for Dahua's 2024–2025 event calendar. These social media invitation banners were designed to maintain brand consistency while capturing the unique energy of specific industry trade shows.

Security & Infrastructure — Security Essen, OV Expo, and Nationale VerkeersExpo

Tech & Innovation — ISE (Integrated Systems Europe) and EuroCIS

04 — B2B Product Launch & Technical Literature

Bridging innovation
and information

To support Dahua's newest business line launches, I designed comprehensive B2B brochures and booklets that translate complex AIoT specifications into clear, high-impact marketing tools.

These designs go beyond aesthetics — they are built for sales enablement. I focused on organising deep technical details, feature sets, and product benefits into a cohesive visual story that helps partners and installers understand the value of new technology at a glance.

The impact

"My designs unified the marketing message across various European regions, ensuring that Dahua's presence at events like ISE and Security Essen was both professional and unforgettable."
